protocol.name: kde_toplevel_hints_v1
protocol.copyright:
SPDX-FileCopyrightText: 2026 KWin Authors
SPDX-License-Identifier: LGPL-2.1-only OR LGPL-3.0-only OR LicenseRef-KDE-Accepted-LGPL

interface.name: kde_toplevel_hints_manager_v1
interface.description:
This protocol allows clients to set behavioral hints on xdg-shell toplevels. Hints inform the compositor of the window's intended presentation, but the compositor may ignore or override them based on user configuration or policy.
This is a KDE-specific protocol. It may be promoted to a cross-desktop standard in the future.

request.name: destroy
request.description: Destroy this manager. Hints objects created from it remain valid.

request.name: get_hints

description.summary: get hints object for a toplevel

request.description: Create a hints object for the given toplevel. Only one hints object may exist per toplevel at a time; attempting to create a second is a protocol error.

entry.name: already_constructed
entry.summary: a hints object already exists for this toplevel

interface.name: kde_toplevel_hints_v1

description.summary: behavioral hints for an xdg-shell toplevel

interface.description:
Hints set by the client on a toplevel. All hints are optional and the compositor may ignore or override them.
Destroying this object clears all hints previously set through it.

request.name: destroy
request.description: Destroy the hints object. All hints previously set through this object are cleared.

request.name: set_skip_taskbar
request.description:
Request that this toplevel not appear in taskbars or dock window lists. Suitable for panels, OSDs, and other non-application windows.
A value of zero clears the hint.

request.name: set_skip_switcher

description.summary: hint to skip the window switcher

request.description:
Request that this toplevel not appear in window switchers (e.g. Alt+Tab).
A value of zero clears the hint.
